summary: All 11 MVP tickets complete. Ticket 0011 delivered: photo compression+preview modal, AI vision toggle in Settings, PRD-aligned condition colours, smooth theme transitions, and ARIA accessibility on AddRoomSheet and BottomNav FAB. 259 tests passing.
techStack: React 18 + Vite 5 PWA, React Router v6, Tailwind CSS v3, Dexie.js v4 (IndexedDB), jsPDF 4, Claude Haiku (AI vision), Supabase JS v2 (sync, gated on VITE_SUPABASE_URL), Google Places API (optional), SW cache-first assets
recentChanges: Ticket 0011: Photo compression (canvas, 1200px max, JPEG 0.85) + preview/confirm modal before Dexie save
Ticket 0011: Settings — AI Analysis section with enable/disable toggle (pl_ai_enabled key)
Ticket 0011: preferences.js — getAiEnabled/setAiEnabled; enqueueRoom respects preference
Ticket 0011: Condition colours synced to PRD §4.3.3 (Good=#06D6A0, Fair=#FFD166, Damaged=#EF476F)
Ticket 0011: Body theme transition (background-color + color, 200ms ease)
Ticket 0011: AddRoomSheet — role=dialog, aria-modal=true, aria-label on container + close button
ticket-0011.test.js — 35 tests (compression, AI pref, colour tokens, a11y)
blockers: VITE_ANTHROPIC_KEY not set — AI analysis inactive until .env configured
VITE_SUPABASE_URL + VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY not set — sync inactive until Supabase project created
Client-side API keys need server-side proxy before production (Phase 2)
Rooms/items/photos cloud sync deferred to Phase 2
nextSteps: Phase 2: Supabase project setup (auth, rooms/items/photos cloud sync)
Phase 2: Server-side Anthropic proxy (remove VITE_ANTHROPIC_KEY from client)
Tier gating: PDF watermark removal for paid plans
Onboarding: first-run wizard for new inspectors
